class.name: CSVAsyncTask
class.brief_description: Asynchronous CSV and DSV load/save task.
class.description: CSVAsyncTask runs CSV or DSV load/save work on a background thread. Use the static constructors to configure a task, call [method start], then poll state or wait with [method wait_to_finish]. Load tasks expose rows with [method get_rows] and [method get_table].

method.name: cancel
method.description: Requests cancellation. The task stops between row operations.

method.name: get_error
method.description: Returns the task error message, or an empty string when no error occurred.

method.name: get_progress
method.description: Returns progress in the range [code]0.0[/code] to [code]1.0[/code].

method.name: get_rows
method.description: Returns loaded rows for load tasks. Save tasks return an empty array.

method.name: get_table
method.description: Returns loaded rows wrapped in a [CSVTable].

method.name: is_cancelled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the task finished due to cancellation.

method.name: is_done
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when the task has finished, failed, or been cancelled.

method.name: is_running
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] while the background thread is active.

method.name: load_csv
method.description: Creates a task that loads typed CSV rows from [param path].

method.name: load_dsv
method.description: Creates a task that loads raw DSV rows from [param path].

method.name: save_csv
method.description: Creates a task that saves CSV rows to [param path]. [param options] may include [code]header_names[/code], [code]color_as_hex[/code], and [code]hex_include_alpha[/code].

method.name: save_dsv
method.description: Creates a task that saves raw DSV rows to [param path].

method.name: wait_to_finish
method.description: Blocks until the background thread finishes. This is useful for tests or command-line workflows.

signal.name: cancelled
signal.description: Emitted when the task finishes due to cancellation.

signal.name: completed
signal.description: Emitted when the task finishes successfully.
